The '''ikov''' was a species of rodent that was native to the [[Wroshyr tree/Legends|wroshyr tree]] forests of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].<ref name="Secrets of Kashyyyk">{{GamerCite|4|Secrets of Kashyyyk}}</ref> One of the planet's smaller predators, it inhabited one of the upper levels of the Kashyyyk ecosystem, right beneath the tree-top level. It was a small, lean, and streamlined creature, adapted to stealthy and swift climbing through the trees.<ref name="The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook">''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]''</ref> It fed primarily by scavenging prey that had fallen from the uppermost [[wroshyr]] tree branches; these animals rarely survived such a fall, and the furtive ikov was almost always the first to find them.<ref name="Secrets of Kashyyyk" /> The inner surfaces of its finely-serrated, blade-like teeth were reflective and iridescent, a trait uncommon among predators;<ref name="The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook" /> these sharp teeth allowed the ikov to quickly cut a piece of meat and run if chased from its finds by larger predators, which it was too small to fend off.<ref name="Secrets of Kashyyyk" />

[[Wilek Nereus]] possessed three specimens of this animal in his tooth collection, two of which, likely immature specimens, he had surprised in a fur-lined tree hollow.<ref name="The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook" />
